labels.numberOfEcfOrbits: Number of ECF Orbits to Draw

tooltips.showInfoOnHover: Show more information when hovering over a satellite.
tooltips.drawOrbits: Disable this to hide orbit lines
tooltips.drawTrailingOrbits: Enable this to show where a satellite was instead of where it is going
tooltips.drawOrbitsInEcf: Orbits will be drawn using ECF vs ECI (Mainly for GEO Orbits)
tooltips.drawFovLines: Draw lines from sensor to satellites when in FOV
tooltips.showCameraWidget: Disable this to hide the camera widget
tooltips.showConfidenceLevels: Show confidence levels for satellite's element sets.
tooltips.enableDemoMode: Every 3 seconds a new satellite will be selected from FOV
tooltips.enableFreezeTime: Time will freeze as you rotate the camera.
tooltips.compensateEarthRotation: Compensate camera yaw for Earth rotation so the view stays fixed to geographic coordinates.

help.overview: The Settings menu holds the application wide display and interaction options: orbit drawing, hover behavior, camera aids, and performance sensitive extras. Other plugins also contribute their own sections here, so this is the single place to tune how KeepTrack behaves.
help.imgAlt: The Settings menu with its general option switches
help.imgCaption: Toggle options, then apply them with Update Settings.
help.howToUse:
1. Open Settings from the bottom bar.
  2. Toggle the switches you want; hover any row for a tooltip explaining it.
  3. Click Update Settings to apply. Some options redraw the scene immediately.
  4. Reset to Defaults restores every option, including plugin contributed sections, to factory values.
help.tip1: Options under Fast CPU Required, like showing the next pass on hover, run extra calculations every frame; leave them off on slower machines.
help.tip2: Plugin sections at the bottom come from other plugins (Watchlist, Time Machine, and more), so the menu grows as plugins are enabled.
